\caption{All predeclared paired comparisons. $\Delta=\operatorname{AURC}(\mathrm{Dice\text{-}M32})-\operatorname{AURC}(\mathrm{nHD95\text{-}M32})$; hence negative values favor Dice-M32. CIs are paired image-cluster bootstrap percentile intervals and are unadjusted. Each raw two-sided bootstrap $p$-value uses the same paired resamples as its interval; Holm adjustment covers all 20 comparisons. Lower $p$-values indicate stronger evidence, but no result is filtered for significance. Each cell stacks $\Delta$, its 95\% CI, and raw/Holm-adjusted $p$-values, in that order. Methods and model conditions form rows; datasets form columns. CLIP-G and CLIP-T denote CLIPSeg-General and CLIPSeg-Target; DL-T and DL-E denote DeepLabV3-Target and DeepLabV3-External.}
